new_posts.title: Dependabot alerts are now assignable to AI agents for remediation
new_posts.summary: Some dependency vulnerabilities require more than a version bump—they need code changes across your project. You can now assign Dependabot alerts to AI coding agents, including Copilot, Claud

new_posts.title: Dependabot version updates now support the Nix ecosystem
new_posts.summary: Dependabot now supports Nix flakes. Add nix as a package ecosystem in your dependabot.yml file. Dependabot will then monitor your flake.lock inputs and open pull requests when newer commits areR

new_posts.title: Code scanning: Batch apply security alert suggestions on pull requests
new_posts.summary:
GitHub code scanning alerts on pull requests are now easier to address with bulk actions. You can now apply fixes for code scanning alerts in the Files changed tab by…

new_posts.title: npm trusted publishing now supports CircleCI
new_posts.summary: npm trusted publishing now supports CircleCI as an OIDC provider, joining GitHub Actions and GitLab CI/CD. Maintainers publishing from CircleCI workflows can now eliminate stored credentials entire

new_posts.title: Copilot usage metrics now identify active and passive Copilot code review users
new_posts.summary: Copilot usage metrics now indicate which users have Copilot code review (CCR) activity, and whether that activity was active or passive. Enterprise and organization admins can see how users engage&

new_posts.title: GitHub Copilot CLI combines model families for a second opinion
new_posts.summary:
Discover how Rubber Duck provides a different perspective to GitHub Copilot CLI.

new_posts.title: Organization runner controls for Copilot cloud agent
new_posts.summary:

new_posts.summary: We have deprecated the following models across all GitHub Copilot experiences (including Copilot Chat, inline edits, ask and agent modes, and code completions) on April 1, 2026. Model Deprecation d

new_posts.title: Organization firewall settings for Copilot cloud agent
new_posts.summary: Copilot cloud agent includes a built-in agent firewall to control Copilot’s internet access and help protect against prompt injection and data exfiltration. Until now, the firewall was config

new_posts.title: Run multiple agents at once with /fleet in Copilot CLI
new_posts.summary:
/fleet lets Copilot CLI dispatch multiple agents in parallel. Learn how to write prompts that split work across files, declare dependencies, and avoid common pitfalls.

The post

new_posts.title: Agent-driven development in Copilot Applied Science
new_posts.summary:
I used coding agents to build agents that automated part of my job. Here's what I learned about working better with coding agents.
